title: DESERO 5PCS Round Plastic Food Containers with Lids, Food Portion Box Meal Prep Food Storage Container Lunch Box Set Snack Pots for Microwave Freezer Dishwasher Reusable - 500ML
features: 【Product Attributes】This set contains 5 transparent plastic food containers with blue lids. Each measures 4.12 x 2.95 x 2.95 inches (17.6oz, 500ml), suitable for storing fruits, snacks, meals. Ideal for portion control, meal prepping, picnics

【Portable and Stackable Design】These stackable, convenient and reusable Food Storage Boxes are ideal for healthy meal prep at school, work or during travel. Their efficient stacking design saves fridge space
【Safe and Durable Materials】Made of BPA-free and food-grade safe PP materials, these food storage boxes with lids are durable. The leak proof lids keep contents fresh and prevent spills

【Microwave & Dishwasher Safe】Constructed with anti-freeze and high-temp resistant materials, these food storage boxes with lids are safe for microwave, freezer, and dishwasher use. They ensure easy, deformation-free cleaning, great for busy households

【What You Get】Receive a 5-pack of 500ml plastic food Portion boxes with blue lids. Each Container Sets is designed to provide optimal performance and value, making meal prepping and organization a breeze
description: Product Description Suitable for refrigerators, microwaves, and dishwashers Keeps food fresh when stored in the refrigerator. Enables safe reheating in the microwave without getting damaged. Facilitates easy cleaning in the dishwasher. Ideal for storing a variety of items such as fruits, snacks, and meals Screw Lid on Lunch Boxes: Leak-Proof, Long-Lasting & Adjustable Enhanced Design Screw Lid The screw lid of the lunch box ensures a tight seal for freshness, is easy to operate for convenient access, and features a durable design for long-term use. Stackable Design The stackable design of the lunch box enables neat storage. It maximizes space utilization, making kitchens or storage areas more organized and allowing for easy access and transportation of multiple boxes. Premium Materials Made from BPA-free, food-grade safe PP materials, the lunch box is constructed with anti-freeze and high-temperature resistant properties, ensuring safety and durability for various uses. Perfect for food storage whether at school, in the workplace, or while traveling

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher safe, microwave safe, freezer safe. Clean by hand with a damp cloth or wipe with a dry cloth.
